start.speaker: Obstinate
start.text: So you really left. I came all this way to fetch you back. Look — the city is still in sight. One turn, and you sleep in your own bed tonight.
start.text_zh: 你当真走了。我大老远追来，就是要把你带回去。瞧——城还在眼前。回个头，今晚你就能睡回自己的床。

choices.text: I will not go back to a house that is burning.
choices.text_zh: 我不会回到一座正在焚烧的屋子里去。

choices.text: I follow what is written in the book. Will you not read it?
choices.text_zh: 我跟随书上所写的。你不愿读一读吗？

choices.text: And if the light ahead is only distance and wishful thinking?
choices.text_zh: 万一前方那光只是距离和一厢情愿呢？

mock_book.speaker: Obstinate
mock_book.text: Your book! A bundle of another man's dreams. I left such fancies behind when I learned to live in the world as it actually is.
mock_book.text_zh: 你那本书！不过是别人的一堆梦呓。当我学会照着世界本来的样子去活，就把这些幻想都丢下了。

choices.text: Then we are each content — I with my book, you with your world. I walk on.
choices.text_zh: 那我们各得其所——我守着我的书，你守着你的世界。我继续走。

choices.text: Perhaps... perhaps you have lived more wisely than I.
choices.text_zh: 也许……也许你活得比我更明智。

press_doubt.speaker: Obstinate
press_doubt.text: Wishful thinking — exactly. There is nothing out here but mud and strangers' sermons. Come home while you can still laugh about it tomorrow.
press_doubt.text_zh: 一厢情愿——正是。这外头除了泥泞和陌生人的说教，什么都没有。趁你明天还笑得出来，回家吧。

choices.text: No. Even trembling, I would rather seek the light than make peace with the fire.
choices.text_zh: 不。哪怕颤抖，我也宁愿寻那光，也不愿与那火言和。

gives_up.speaker: Obstinate
gives_up.text: Then keep your burden and your little light. I am done chasing a fool toward his sorrow.
gives_up.text_zh: 那就留着你的重担和你那点微光吧。我不再追着一个傻子奔他的愁苦了。

choices.text: (Watch him turn back toward the city, and walk on alone.)
